description_long: This bungalow is situated on a polygonal plot with a green lawn and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a modern, rectilinear design with a flat roof and a combination of white and beige exterior walls. The front facade includes large windows and a prominent entryway, while the rear section appears to have a more private, enclosed area. A small, attached structure, possibly a garage or utility room, is visible adjacent to the main building. The property is bordered by a low wall and includes a separate, smaller outbuilding or covered area at the back. The overall layout is open, with clear separation between the main living space and auxiliary structures.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, white and beige walls, and a spacious green plot featuring a driveway and auxiliary structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, and the low boundary wall.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the main building, auxiliary structure, and the open green space.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the bungalow, the smaller outbuilding, and the enclosed backyard area.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the flat roof, the main structure, and the relationship between the house and the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
